rule.name: Cisco Discovery
rule.description: Find information about network devices that is not stored in config files
rule.query:
{
  "keywords": [
    "dir",
    "show arp",
    "show cdp",
    "show clock",
    "show ip interface",
    "show ip route",
    "show ip sockets",
    "show processes",
    "show ssh",
    "show users",
    "show version"
  ],
  "condition": "keywords"
}
false_positives: Commonly used by administrators for troubleshooting
